extra.reason: Polished interval setup/running UI, replaced synthesized WAVs with documented CC0-like BigSoundBank bowl MP3s, verified TypeScript and Expo web start/stop flow.
Generated project SPEC.md
Added phone-width localhost layout, in-memory per-device session history, current-session repetition count, SPEC coverage, TypeScript validation, and verified Expo web on port 4000.
Completed: web script now requests port 7000, SPEC.md documents localhost:7000, and Expo web is responding with HTTP 200 on localhost:7000.
Completed: SPEC.md and package web script now use localhost:4000, and Bell Expo web responds with HTTP 200 on localhost:4000.
Implemented Play-only chime preview behavior, tightened Chime spacing, and verified with TypeScript.
Clarified SPEC-first workflow for all product and code behavior changes, including small tweaks.
Moved recent sessions behind a top-right history button, removed the empty history state, updated SPEC.md first, and verified with TypeScript plus a localhost smoke check.
Generated willow-themed bell icon candidate, saved it under assets, and documented the icon direction in SPEC.md before asset generation.
Configured Expo native icon, Android adaptive icon foreground, and web favicon to use assets/app-icon-bell-willow.png after updating SPEC.md.

Added native SafeAreaView around app content, reduced setup top padding within the safe area, documented safe-area behavior in SPEC.md, and verified TypeScript. iOS simulator checks were unavailable because simctl is not installed.
Adjusted Chime section spacing after documenting the visual spacing expectation in SPEC.md; verified TypeScript and localhost render.
Replaced the 90-second preset with a Custom interval option, added minute/second inputs, documented behavior in SPEC.md first, and verified with TypeScript plus localhost smoke check.
Moved session history to a separate in-app History view with calendar date/time rows and a back action; updated SPEC.md first and verified with TypeScript plus localhost smoke check.
Changed setup subtitle to 'Interval timer', tucked the history button into a cleaner top-right header position, updated SPEC.md first, and verified TypeScript plus localhost render.
Added keyboard-aware custom interval editing with focus scrolling, inline Done control, and iOS input accessory Done action; updated SPEC.md first and verified TypeScript plus localhost smoke check.
Changed custom default to 10:00 and fixed seconds editing by separating editable text state from normalized interval formatting; verified TypeScript and localhost smoke check.

Removed blur-time normalization so custom seconds can be temporarily blank while editing; Done remains the only normalizing action. Verified TypeScript and observed blank seconds state in browser smoke check.
Added swipe-left history rows with a revealed Delete action, documented behavior in SPEC.md first, and verified TypeScript plus History page render.
Committed current Bell app workspace and pushed main to git@github.com:CorwinCheung/Bell.git.
